name: Friend with Benefits
original_name: จาก Friend With Benefits กลายเป็นคู่ชีวิตซะงั้น
overview: Heartbroken over her recent split with her boyfriend, Vicky goes out for a night in town with some friends. After being teased by her friends for being too "vanilla", Vicky meets singer Nune, and they go home together. With Vicky still harbouring feelings for her ex, will Nune be able to win her heart, or will they just be friends with benefits?
